text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Today, I'm visiting a chapel to help<n>out with a
school-sponsored photo<n>shoot.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, what a gorgeous chapel! I feel like<n>I could meet
a prince here!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You have such a one-track mind...<n>Though I have
to agree, this place<n>isn't half bad.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
In any case, we're here as<n>volunteers. Don't get
distracted.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but of course! I'll make sure to<n>work hard
enough to earn my chance<n>at meeting a prince!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
You're helping out too, correct? It's<n>wonderful to
have a trainer on the<n>team! Welcome!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: And with that, the event begins.<n>However...

text_block_list.name: Cameraman
text_block_list.text:
This'll make for some great shots!<n>Be a dear and
pose a little!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I already said no! Stop pointing the<n>camera at me!

text_block_list.name: Cameraman
text_block_list.text:
Oh, don't be like that! I need you to<n>model for me!
Please!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...What's this? I hear an ill-mannered<n>voice.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Yes, it's that cameraman. He's<n>ignoring all the
rules.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Then I shall have to intervene. I'll<n>save you,
Dober!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? Wait, Kawakami!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: HYAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: BAM!

text_block_list.name: Cameraman
text_block_list.text:
Holy crap! Why is there a huge hole<n>in the
ground?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
You there! Stop harassing Dober, or<n>I'll knock you
into next week!

text_block_list.name: Cameraman
text_block_list.text:
What are you talking about?! You<n>almost hit me
when yo—

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: SILENCE! The price for angering a<n>lady is steep!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: If you do not cease this instant, well...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: CRRRRACK!

text_block_list.name: Cameraman
text_block_list.text: Eek! I-I'm sorry! I'll be going<n>nowwww!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The photographer flees the scene at<n>the sight of
Kawakami Princess's<n>righteous might.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Thanks, Kawakami. If only I'd set<n>clearer
boundaries from the start...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
No, you didn't do anything wrong,<n>Dober. I'll
always be here if you ever<n>need me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Okay, now, where were we? Right!<n>Back to work
so I can meet my<n>prince!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
So you can meet your prince, huh?<n>Admirable, but I
don't think how you<n>meet will matter all that much.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh? What do you mean by that, I<n>wonder?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well, now. If you're curious, why not<n>ask that
trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Based on seeing what Kawakami<n>Princess did
just now, I believe...
choice_data_list: Your prince will be the one to find you.
You may just become a prince yourself.
You may just become a prince yourself.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Based on seeing what Kawakami<n>Princess did
just now, I believe...
choice_data_list: Your prince will be the one to find you.
You may just become a prince yourself.
You may just become a prince yourself.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I tell Kawakami Princess that her<n>many wonderful
and unique quirks<n>will have princes flocking her
way.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Wow, really?! My charm will attract<n>my suitor?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But what quirks do I have? I wish to<n>hear more,
King!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Um, quirks? Uh...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I want to know everything! I need<n>details! What
are these charms of<n>mine?! Where are they?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Why are you asking me?! Ask the<n>trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess certainly has big<n>dreams for
the future. I feel certain<n>that she has what it takes
to find her<n>perfect prince someday.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Wow! I've never thought about that!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I can't really picture it, but a princess<n>should
always be open-minded!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I'd love to try being a prince at least<n>once!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
So I'll need your help, King. Let's<n>walk down the
aisle together!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'd like you to be there for my royal<n>debut as a
princess—no—as a prince!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: F-fine! Just put your fists away!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ohoho, one day I'll be a princess<n>walking like this
beside my prince. ♪

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, so in the end, you're a princess.<n>Well, that
role does suit you better.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess certainly has big<n>dreams for
the future. I feel certain<n>that she has what it takes
to find her<n>perfect prince someday.
